faqs.question: Which university is more affordable for BA course among Motherhood University and Quantum University?
faqs.answer:
The total tuition fee for BA courses at Quantum University ranged from INR 1.6 Lacs to INR 1.9 lakh. On the other hand, the total tuition fee for BA courses at Motherhood University ranges from INR 34,500 to INR 94,000. Hence, it clearly can be seen that Motherhood University is more affordable than Quantum University for BA courses. However, the fee structure can be only one component that candidates consider while comparing institutes, but several factors can be taken into account while choosing the best university/college, such as placement packages, seats, ranking of that particular institute, affiliation, accreditation, etc. 
The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change.  Therefore, it is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the placement package offered at Quantum University? Does it justify the ROI?
faqs.answer:
The official website of the University includes the highest and average packages. To know the ROI, let's first look at the fee structure of the University. The total fee for BTech generally ranges between INR 4.62 lakh and INR 6.42 lakh. Now, the average package offered to the 2025 passing out batch was INR 7.20 LPA which is above the highest expected fee. Thus, it indicates that students can easily meet the ROI. The table below depicts the Quantum University placement packages:
Particulars
Placement Statistics (2025)
Highest package
INR 33.50 LPA
Average package
INR 7.20 LPA
NOTE: The above details are fetched from the official website, however, the placement year is not mentioned. Hence, considered it for 2025.

faqs.question: Does Quantum University offer internships to BA LLB students?
faqs.answer: Yes, Quantum University does offer internships to BA LLB students. According to the information present on the official website of the college, the curriculum of the BA LLB course shows that the BA LLB students get the Summer Internship in their second, fourth semester, sixth semester, eighth semester, and tenth semesters. Therfore, in every even semester of the course, candidates are offered with the internship.  The exact period of the internship is mentioned in the curriculum, which is available at the official website of the university.

college_info.intro:
Quantum University comprises of 8 departments, including Technology, Agriculture, Media, Health Sciences, Law, and others. BTech, BSc, and MBA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
Quantum University Roorkee offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of CSE, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and others. After pursuing BTech, students can work as Web Developers, Data Science Engineer, Automotive Developers, Robotics Engineer, and others. Below-mentioned are Quantum University's popular programmes:
Check out more on Quantum University courses in the below video:

placements.overview: Quantum University placements 2025 have not been released yet. The University has released the placement 2024 stats on its official website. As per the details, 192 companies visited the University campus in 2024 and placed 872 students. The highest package offered during Quantum University placements 2024 was INR 33.50 LPA and the average package stood at INR 7.20 LPA. The list of recruiters included Oracle, Adobe, Capgemini, and many others.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee of NID DAT 2026 for the B. Des for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates is INR 3,000. SC, ST, PwD candidates only ned to pay INR 1,500. However note that the application fees for overseas candidates seeking admission to supernumerary seats is INR 5000. In case of the M.Des programme, the application fees for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates applying for one discipline is INR 3,000. If two disciplines are chosen, the application fee is INR 6000. Meanwhile, SC, ST, PwD candidate need to pay INR 1,500 for one discipline, and INR 3000 for two disciplines.The NID DAT 2026 application form is now open.

faqs.answer: A:    CUET UG 2026 exam will be conducted in May/June for 37 subjects. The mode of examination is CBT (Computer Based Test). NTA did not release official notification for CUET UG date sheet. Candidates can know exam details through CUET UG information bulletin. NTA will conduct CUET UG 2026 exam in multiple phases depending upon the number of candidates registering for the exam. Registered candidates can know the exact CUET UG exam on hall ticket. Candidates will have to report at the alloted exam centre on the day of the examination. The exam will be held in two slots each day depending upon the subject combinations chosen by the candidate.
faqs.question: When will be CUET UG exam conducted?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Quantum University.

review_content.Placements: Quantum holds a record of more than 85 percent of the batch students getting placed through campus placements, and in our course, it is 90 percent. The highest package offered is 7 LPA for BPT, and the average package ranges from 3-4 LPA. The college has tie-ups with many private hospitals nearby in Dehradun, Haridwar, and Rishikesh.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in Quantum University is good, according to the fees and all. Buildings are well furnished. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are well-maintained. Libraries are well updated with books. Hostels are also quite good. It also provides a mess, laundry, gym, Wi-Fi, and many sports facilities in the hostel. Food is quite good in taste and full of variety.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Quantum is the best choice I have ever made.

review_content.Placements: I am still pursuing the course here, but more than 85 percent of the batch gets placement through campus placement. The highest package was 7 LPA last year, and the average was 4 LPA. Many private hospital recruit from our college. The students, after getting placed in many hospitals, chose their careers according to their preferences.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure, facilities, such as buildings, labs, and classrooms are very well maintained and well-equipped with the latest updates. Hostel is offered with many facilities like mess, gym, laundry, Wi-Fi, and many sports facilities. The mess is very hygienic and clean, and the food is so good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Business intelligence and Analytics Collaboration with Samartrix - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Quantum University is the best university in the Roorkee area.

review_content.Placements: The highest placement percentage is 85 percent, the maximum package is not more than 2.5 LPA, companies like Arvind Fashion, Tata Consultancy, Amardeep Design, Yacca, Pritam Pvt. Ltd., and Asian East West Pharma visit the campus, and I completed an Internshala online course in Business Intelligence and Data Analytics with 60 percent.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for students. Classrooms are good. Libraries are good, with books and a computer library. Every department has its own library. There is a quite good facility in the hostel. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is normal, and medical facilities are also good. Sports and games are not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Quantum University.

review_content.Placements: Quantum University was one of the best universities in Uttarakhand that provided good quality education with good placements every year. The placement percentage of Quantum University was above 80%. More than 70 companies visited the university every year for jobs. Many reputed companies were Tata, HCL, and TCS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Quantum University provided good hostel facility. In this facility, they provided food, lodging, laundry, Wi-Fi, gym, and 24-hour security. University also provided good sports facility. University did not charge any extra amount for this. University provided interdisciplinary education.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the BCA course.

review_content.Placements: 70-80 percent of students got placed. According to me, 50 percent of students got placements. The average package ranges from 2.5-3 LPA. Top roles offered are software developer, QA analyst, SEO, etc. Companies like TCS visit the pool placements. Not many IT companies visit, but many sales companies give good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi works relatively slowly, but new 5G routers are now being installed in hostel labs and on the campus for faster speeds. There are two libraries in the college. The old one is a little bit bigger than the new library. It has sufficient books, but the new one has business-related books.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Life at Quantum University Roorkee is full of new experiences and lessons.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good, and 85 percent of the batch students get placed through campus placements. The highest package offered in our course is 6 LPA. The average package is 4.5 LPA. After the physiotherapy course, we can join a hospital and can even open our own clinics.
review_content.Infrastructure: Quantum provides very nice facilities and a good infrastructure on the campus. The location and surroundings are peaceful and beautiful. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library are well-furnished and maintained with well-equipped labs. The mess and canteen of the college are one of the best places where I feel like a second home. Everything is just so good, clean, and pure in every aspect.

faqs.answer: Quantum University/Quantum School of Law may take CUET UG scores for admission to the BA LLB course. Also, the admission eligibility for BA LLB courses is that candidates should pass Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 50%, and CUET UG score acceptance is not specified on the official university website. faqs.question: Q: Is CUET compulsory for admissions to BA LLB courses at Quantum University?

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for admission to the MBA programme at Quantum School of Business, Quantum University, is a graduate degree of a minimum three-year duration from any stream with a minimum of 50% marks. The admission to the MBA programme is based on valid scores in the University-accepted entrance exams like CAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT or merit scores in Class 12. The university conducts an Entrance cum Scholarship Exam called Q-Care for Admission.

review_summary.college_name: Quantum University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Quantum University.

content.Placements: Quantum holds a record of more than 85 percent of the batch students getting placed through campus placements, and in our course, it is 90 percent. The highest package offered is 7 LPA for BPT, and the average package ranges from 3-4 LPA. The college has tie-ups with many private hospitals nearby in Dehradun, Haridwar, and Rishikesh.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in Quantum University is good, according to the fees and all. Buildings are well furnished. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are well-maintained. Libraries are well updated with books. Hostels are also quite good. It also provides a mess, laundry, gym, Wi-Fi, and many sports facilities in the hostel. Food is quite good in taste and full of variety.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Quantum is the best choice I have ever made.

content.Placements: I am still pursuing the course here, but more than 85 percent of the batch gets placement through campus placement. The highest package was 7 LPA last year, and the average was 4 LPA. Many private hospital recruit from our college. The students, after getting placed in many hospitals, chose their careers according to their preferences.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure, facilities, such as buildings, labs, and classrooms are very well maintained and well-equipped with the latest updates. Hostel is offered with many facilities like mess, gym, laundry, Wi-Fi, and many sports facilities. The mess is very hygienic and clean, and the food is so good.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business intelligence and Analytics Collaboration with Samartrix - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Quantum University is the best university in the Roorkee area.

content.Placements: The highest placement percentage is 85 percent, the maximum package is not more than 2.5 LPA, companies like Arvind Fashion, Tata Consultancy, Amardeep Design, Yacca, Pritam Pvt. Ltd., and Asian East West Pharma visit the campus, and I completed an Internshala online course in Business Intelligence and Data Analytics with 60 percent.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for students. Classrooms are good. Libraries are good, with books and a computer library. Every department has its own library. There is a quite good facility in the hostel. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is normal, and medical facilities are also good. Sports and games are not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Quantum University.

content.Placements: Quantum University was one of the best universities in Uttarakhand that provided good quality education with good placements every year. The placement percentage of Quantum University was above 80%. More than 70 companies visited the university every year for jobs. Many reputed companies were Tata, HCL, and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: Quantum University provided good hostel facility. In this facility, they provided food, lodging, laundry, Wi-Fi, gym, and 24-hour security. University also provided good sports facility. University did not charge any extra amount for this. University provided interdisciplinary education.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the BCA course.

content.Placements: 70-80 percent of students got placed. According to me, 50 percent of students got placements. The average package ranges from 2.5-3 LPA. Top roles offered are software developer, QA analyst, SEO, etc. Companies like TCS visit the pool placements. Not many IT companies visit, but many sales companies give good placements.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi works relatively slowly, but new 5G routers are now being installed in hostel labs and on the campus for faster speeds. There are two libraries in the college. The old one is a little bit bigger than the new library. It has sufficient books, but the new one has business-related books.

faqs.question: Can I open a clinic after completing a BPharm degree from Quantum University?
faqs.answer: No, students are not allowed to open a clinic after completing the BPharm degree from Qunatum University. According to PCI (Pharmacy Council of India), pharmacist are not eligible to open their own clinics. To start the clinic, a person should be a holder of an MBBS degree. Without an MBBS degree, no one can operate a clinic or even prescribe medicine to patients. However, after completing the BPharm degree, graduates are eligible to obtain a license for the chemist/medicine shop. A pharmacist s

faqs.question: Is MBA admission at Quantum University merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: For admissions to the MBA course at Quantum University, the university accepts the scores of alidCAT/CMAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT/ University entrance examscores will give preference to and GD/ PI/ Cleared University examination.Additionally, a minimum aggregate of 50% is required in Class 12 and graduation for the MBA course. However, the merit cutoff may vary each academic year. Therefore, Quantum University does accept the scores of entrance examinations for admission to the MBA course.

faqs.question: Is CUET compulsory for admissions to BA LLB courses at Quantum University?
faqs.answer: Quantum University/Quantum School of Law may take CUET UG scores for admission to the BA LLB course. Also, the admission eligibility for BA LLB courses is that candidates should pass Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 50%, and CUET UG score acceptance is not specified on the official university website. However, Quantum University does provide scholarships based on CUET performance for entry into several undergraduate programmes, such as BA LLB.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to MBA at Quantum School of Business Quantum University?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for admission to the MBA programme at Quantum School of Business, Quantum University, is a graduate degree of a minimum three-year duration from any stream with a minimum of 50% marks. The admission to the MBA programme is based on valid scores in the University-accepted entrance exams like CAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT or merit scores in Class 12. The university conducts an Entrance cum Scholarship Exam called Q-Care for Admission.

faqs.question: When will be CUET UG exam conducted?
faqs.answer: CUET UG 2026 exam will be conducted in May/June for 37 subjects. The mode of examination isCBT (Computer Based Test). NTA did not release official notification for CUET UG date sheet. Candidates can know exam details through CUET UG information bulletin. NTA will conduct CUET UG 2026 exam in multiple phases depending upon the number of candidates registering for the exam. Registered candidates can know the exact CUET UG exam on hall ticket. Candidates will have to report at the alloted exam centre on the day of the examination. The exam will be held in two slots each day depending upon the subject combinations chosen by the candidate.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for BBA course at Quantum University?
faqs.answer: Quantum University offers a BBA at the UG level in the specialisations of general and BBA in Business intelligence and Analytics Collaboration with Samartrix. Moreover, the university also offers an integrated BBA + MBA course in Family Business Management for the duration of five years.Candidates who are interested in pursuing their bachelor's at the university can apply to the programme as per their eligibility in either online or offline mode. Students have to pay a registration fee ofINR 1,200to complete the application process. Additionally, this application fee is non-refundable.

placement_data.title: Quantum University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has released its placement statistics on its official website, regardless of the year. Hence, considering it for 2025. As per the details, the highest and average packages offered during Quantum University placements in 2025 stood at INR 33.5 LPA and INR 7.20 LPA , respectively. Further, over 192 recruiters visited the Quantum University in 2025 and placed 872 students of the 2025 batch. The top recruiters of Quantum University in 2025 included Amazon, Oracle, Adobe, Capgemini, IBM, and others .

Quantum University has a placement cell which is responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises.

faqs.question: What is the placement package offered at Quantum University? Does it justify the ROI?
faqs.answer: The official website of the University includes the highest and average packages. To know the ROI, let's first look at the fee structure of the University. The total fee for BTech generally ranges between INR 4.62 lakh and INR 6.42 lakh. Now, the average package offered to the 2025 passing out batch was INR 7.20 LPA which is above the highest expected fee. Thus, it indicates that students can easily meet the ROI. The table below depicts the Quantum University placement packages: Particulars Placement Statistics (2025) Highest package INR 33.50 LPA Average package INR 7.20 LPA NOTE: The above details are fetched from the official website, however, the placement year is not mentioned. faqs.question: What is the application fee for NID DAT?
faqs.answer: The application fee of NID DAT 2026 for the B. Des for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates is INR 3,000. SC, ST, PwD candidates only ned to pay INR 1,500. However note that the application fees for overseas candidates seeking admission to supernumerary seats is INR 5000. In case of the M.Des programme, the application fees for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates applying for one discipline is INR 3,000. If two disciplines are chosen, the application fee is INR 6000. Meanwhile, SC, ST, PwD candidate need to pay INR 1,500 for one discipline, and INR 3000 for two disciplines. The NID DAT 2026 application form is now open.

cafeteria.description: The cafeteria of the university has always something delicious to suit every student's taste. While the mess provides with great food, students also love to hang out at the affordably priced cafeteria The Q-Café that houses healthful and yummy snacks for food cravings breaks. The cafeteria is open every day and offers a variety of drinks and snacks between scheduled meals.

hostel.description: The hostel of the university has a number of multipurpose common rooms. These provide places you can read, study, watch TV and relax. Free wi-fi services are available to all the hostel students. The hostel also provides the complimentary laundry services and 24 Hours onsite security services to all hostellers.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball

reviews.review_heading: Review of Quantum University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in Quantum University is good, according to the fees and all. Buildings are well furnished. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are well-maintained. Libraries are well updated with books. Hostels are also quite good. It also provides a mess, laundry, gym, Wi-Fi, and many sports facilities in the hostel. Food is quite good in taste and full of variety.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum is the best choice I have ever made.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure, facilities, such as buildings, labs, and classrooms are very well maintained and well-equipped with the latest updates. Hostel is offered with many facilities like mess, gym, laundry, Wi-Fi, and many sports facilities. The mess is very hygienic and clean, and the food is so good.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum University is the best university in the Roorkee area.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available for students. Classrooms are good. Libraries are good, with books and a computer library. Every department has its own library. There is a quite good facility in the hostel. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is normal, and medical facilities are also good. Sports and games are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Quantum University.
reviews.review_text: Quantum University provided good hostel facility. In this facility, they provided food, lodging, laundry, Wi-Fi, gym, and 24-hour security. University also provided good sports facility. University did not charge any extra amount for this. University provided interdisciplinary education.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the BCA course.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works relatively slowly, but new 5G routers are now being installed in hostel labs and on the campus for faster speeds. There are two libraries in the college. The old one is a little bit bigger than the new library. It has sufficient books, but the new one has business-related books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Quantum School of Health Sciences (Admission Office)
reviews.review_heading: Life at Quantum University Roorkee is full of new experiences and lessons.
reviews.review_text: Quantum provides very nice facilities and a good infrastructure on the campus. The location and surroundings are peaceful and beautiful. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library are well-furnished and maintained with well-equipped labs. The mess and canteen of the college are one of the best places where I feel like a second home. Everything is just so good, clean, and pure in every aspect.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum University review.
reviews.review_text: In the name of facilities and infrastructure, my college is not upto the mark in my course/department. They don't provide Wi-Fi, and there are no fixed classrooms in my course. The library is quite good. Hostel facilities are average. Sports and games are limited.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good university because it provides me with good memories, good placement, and good friend
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is also very good. The Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are also available. Every facility is good. The mess facilities are also available, and the food is good in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum University is one of the best universities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is the most memorable part of college life for the students. At Quantum, world class hostels are not just about buildings, but are the core of every culture. Providing a very secure and fun filled environment that makes the student feel quite at home.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my decision of choosing Quantum.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are fully furnished, well-equipped, and libraries are very well maintained. In hostels, rooms are well furnished with a separate bed, table, chair, cupboard, and fan too. Hostel food is quite good in taste, and the menu is full of variety.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum University offers knowledge and skills.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was quite good. Along with a hygienic environment. The college provided all facilities such as a library, Wi-Fi, labs, and a well-structured building. A great cafeteria for both students and teachers. The food quality was also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Quantum University is the best private university.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure included furnished rooms such as single and double sharing. Basic facilities like beds, study tables, and cupboards were provided. Along with common facilities. Many hostels also offered security, laundry services, and medical facilities. Each room typically had a bed, a mattress, a study table, and other necessary furniture. Everything was good, and Quantum University was very good. Facilities of the college were great.

reviews.review_heading: Learning experience in Quantum.
reviews.review_text: Quantum University has a library included in the fee structure. They issue a card for the library, and you can take the books you want using that card. They also provide hostel facilities, but I didn’t opt for that as I am a local person from Saharanpur, so I used to commute daily, which was more cost-effective for me.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Quantum University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Quantum University in my course B.Tech (hons) cybersecurity is not good at all. There is no Wi-Fi service and even in a training session which is a collaboration with Quick Heal academy. If we work on the system they told us to take your laptop.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my course in Quantum University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Quantum University is not up to the mark. And for our course it provides average facilities of lab and Wi-Fi. If we want to work in college systems, they tell us to take our laptop to do this kind of work. And their systems run very slow.

Total Fee includes security, tution fee, books, university exam fee, resource material and insurance.
Scholarships for CUET Candidates
Students on their satisfactory performance in the Q-Care examination shall be eligible for the grant of following merit scholarships:

To reward brilliant minds perform well in their JEE Mains examination, Quantum University offers scholarships based on their JEE (Mains) rank. Since its inception, University has helped over a thousand JEE Mains rank-holders who deserved world-class education but had financial constraints.

Quantum University believes that money should not be a roadblock for a student having desire for world-class education in his heart. Those who do not appear in Q-Care examination but scores well in their class XII board examination are eligible for the grant of following merit scholarships:

Quantum School of Business, Quantum University offers scholarships based on Q-Care Exam scores, Class 12 board exam scores, and entrance exam scores such as CAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT. For instance, students who score 80% and above in Class 12 board exams or Q-Care Exam are eligible for a 100% scholarship on tuition fees in the first year. Additionally, students with a valid score in CAT/MAT/XAT/NMAT are given preference for MBA admission. The university conducts an Entrance cum Scholarship Exam called Q-Care for Admission, which forms the basis of eligibility for some courses and for scholarships for most of the programs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Voc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I love the Neewara Academy of Design.

review_content.Placements: We have 100% placements in our interior design course. Students get placed with very good interior and furniture design companies in Jaipur, Delhi, Gurgaon, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Pune, Bangalore, etc. The package offered is 6 LPA in companies such as Seek Kitchen, Kiara Kitchen, DLF Group, AKFD, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a very beautiful and airy campus full of natural light, trees, and lots of plants around. It's very eco-friendly. All classrooms have big windows for natural light to come in which is very necessary for sketching. All classrooms are air-conditioned. We have a mental lab and a wood lab for interior furniture manufacturing. We have cafe coffee day machines for coffee and a beautiful canteen where tea, coffee, and Maggie are available for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Voc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Very good college with great faculty members, excellent facilities, and 100% placements.

review_content.Placements: All students were placed in our batch for internships at best of the designers in Jaipur, Delhi, and Mumbai. We got the opportunity to witness FDCI India Fashion Week and Volunteer Ace Fashion Designers of India such as Surendri by Yogesh Choudhary, Sail Kocchar, Nitin Bal Chauhan to name a few. 100% of placements were there.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have got excellent campus, expert teachers, and well-equipped labs for stitching and pattern-making for fashion design. I love my college. I would really want to recommend design aspirants to take admission at Neewara College of Design Banipark Jaipur.

faqs.answer: The mode of application at Neewara Academy of Design is online. Students can visit the online admission portal of the college to apply for their desired programme. Along with filling the form, they must also pay an application fee of INR 2,000.Find below the steps of application:Candidates first visit the official website: (neewara.com/). Now click on Admission from the menu and select "Download Admission Form". or fill the online application with all the required details.Now submit the application form online with all the documents. For the offline process, take a print out fo the Registration form fill in all the required details and attach all the documents as well.Pay the application fee of INR 2,000 while submitting the form online. And as for the offline process, visit the Academy's admission office and submit the form along with the documents and application fee.

review_summary.college_name: Neewara College of Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is very good and friendly. They provide 100% placement.

content.Placements: There is 100% placement and good packages. B.Voc Interior is a very good course to pursue your dream job with a high salary. Every student gets internship and job opportunities at companies like LiveSpace, Asian Paints, and other popular firms. Besides interior design, the course also offers scope in the fashion and jewelry departments.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is not available yet, but they provide information about PG. They also offer material exploration classes and fashion classes, which are fully AC. They conduct cricket matches. Full Wi-Fi is available, and the infrastructure is quite good and nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I recommend everyone interested in the interior design course to Neewara Academy.

content.Placements: 100 % of students are placed in the interior design course in the last batch of 2024 in very good Interior and furniture design companies in Dubai, Mumbai, and Jaipur. The highest package was 6 lacs per annum and the lowest package was 4.5 lacs per annum. Wooden Street, Kiara Kitchen, Seek Kitchen, AKFD, Anantaya, and Architect Anoop Bhartariya recruited the students last year.
content.Infrastructure: We have air-conditioned classrooms with very nice drafting tables to be used in interior design. We have surveillance cameras in every classroom to avoid theft of belongings. Our campus is fully Wi-Fi. We have a wood lab, mental lab, and computer lab on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I love the Neewara Academy of Design.

content.Placements: We have 100% placements in our interior design course. Students get placed with very good interior and furniture design companies in Jaipur, Delhi, Gurgaon, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Pune, Bangalore, etc. The package offered is 6 LPA in companies such as Seek Kitchen, Kiara Kitchen, DLF Group, AKFD, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have a very beautiful and airy campus full of natural light, trees, and lots of plants around. It's very eco-friendly. All classrooms have big windows for natural light to come in which is very necessary for sketching. All classrooms are air-conditioned. We have a mental lab and a wood lab for interior furniture manufacturing. We have cafe coffee day machines for coffee and a beautiful canteen where tea, coffee, and Maggie are available for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Very good college with great faculty members, excellent facilities, and 100% placements.

content.Placements: All students were placed in our batch for internships at best of the designers in Jaipur, Delhi, and Mumbai. We got the opportunity to witness FDCI India Fashion Week and Volunteer Ace Fashion Designers of India such as Surendri by Yogesh Choudhary, Sail Kocchar, Nitin Bal Chauhan to name a few. 100% of placements were there.
content.Infrastructure: We have got excellent campus, expert teachers, and well-equipped labs for stitching and pattern-making for fashion design. I love my college. I would really want to recommend design aspirants to take admission at Neewara College of Design Banipark Jaipur.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Jewellery Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I love Neewara College Of Design for the fantastic jewellery design course.

content.Placements: Neewara Academy placement is very good. 100% placement happens here. My seniors are placed at the best companies in different places in India and overseas, such as Antiquariat Jaipur, Vaibhav Global Ltd, Amrapali, Gem vanity, Tanishq, Motisons, Kalyan Jewellers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college campus is very good. It is green, airy and full of sunlight. I like to come here and study every day. Classrooms are air-conditioned and lit. The jewelry manufacturing lab is very good. The computer lab is very good. The jewelry sketching classroom is very good.

admission_overview.college_name: Neewara College of Design Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: Neewara Academy of Design Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Neewara Academy of Design Admission 2025 is merit-based. Candidates can download the application form available at the official website. The academy is affiliated with Rajasthan ILD Skills University (RISU) and approved by AICTE. It offers undergraduate, diploma, and certificate courses in Design. The degree courses offered by theNeewara Academy of Designare BDes, BVoc, and, MVoc in

Neewara Academy of Design admission to all the offered programmes is based on candidates' past academic records, PI round, Visual Essay, Portfolio, and a character certificate from the student's academic center/school/college.

Neewara Academy of Design Admission 2025 to its offered programme is based on the offline qualifying exam conducted by the University. However, before applying for the exam, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria for the course they want to pursue:
Know more aboutNeewara Academy of Design courses

For Admission to Neewara Academy of Design, candidates have to go through each of the stages of the admission procedure, which is both online and offline. The process involves application form, selection rounds, and admission confirmation. More details about each of the stages in the admission process are explained below:
Step 1: Neewara Academy Application Form 2025

Candidates are required to visit the official website or download the application form. Candidates have to register themselves online and fill the form with all the required details and submit the completed form online and for offline candidates visit the official website.
Step 2: Neewara Academy Selection Rounds

Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria are directly admitted to all the offered programme. Further, students must also appear and perform good in the PI round. Admission is based on the marks obtained in a qualifying examination that includes Visual Essay, Portfolio and a character certificate from the student's academic center/school/college.
Step 3: Merit List
A merit list is prepared based on the test which is displayed in the official website.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
Candidates, whose names are on the Merit list can finalise their admission by submitting the tuition fee.
For more information Neewara Academy of Design check out the below:

faqs.answer: Yes, Neewara Academy of Design offers a three-year BVoc programme. The course is available in two specialisations, namely Fashion and Interior Design. The total seat intake for the programme is60.

Admission to all the offered programme is based on the marks obtained in the qualifying examination. There is no entrance exam required for admission to UG, PG or diploma courses at the college.

placement_report.college_name: Neewara College of Design Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Neewara Academy of Design Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Neewara Academy of Design has a Placement Team that ensures placement assistance to every student. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises.

Recently, Neewara Academy of Design has concluded the placements for the Class of 2024 with a 100% placement rate . As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Neewara Academy of Design placements 2024 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. A total of 50 recruiters visited the Neewara Academy of Design campus for 2024 placements and offered 200 job offers to the students of the 2024 batch. The top recruiters of Neewara Academy of Design in 2024 included TOGS Jaipur, Antiquariat, Gem Plaza, AKFD Stories, Anantaya, Aacho Jaipur, Shuchi VC, Indie Jhola, ZUDIO , etc.

Some of the top recruiters who offered internships to the students include Sleek Kitchens Pune, Kiara Kitchens, Rashi Interiors, Rajshree Jewellers, Raniwala Jewellers, Sahil Kocchar Designs, Shoppers Stop, Lifestyle, Pantaloons, ZUDIO , etc.

highlights.summary: Watch the below space for details regarding the DSIFD Mumbai.

placements.overview: DSIFD Mumbai is one of the well-known institutes and is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra. The institute offers various Certificate, Degree and Diploma courses including PG and UG programs. These programs are offered in full-time and part-time mode, and are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Students can pursue education in multiple courses like B.A., B.Des, B.Sc., Certificate, M.A., M.Des, MBA/PGDM, UG Diploma in the stream of Business and Management Studies, Design, Hospitality and Travel, Science. It provides students with the opportunity to learn from skilled and experienced faculty members who specialize in the fields of Lifestyle Accesory Design, Apparel Design, Lifestyle Accesory Design, Fashion Design, Textile Design, Fashion Design, Fashion Design, Jewellery Design, Fashion Design, Fashion Design, Jewellery Design, Textile Design, Fashion Design, Fashion Design, Fashion Design, Fashion Design. The institute's courses are accessible to candidates seeking quality education at an affordable fee. Students have the opportunity to acquire knowledge and skills in their desired field. DSIFD Mumbai also offers excellent infrastructure facilities.

faqs.answer: A:    No, a candidates can't get admission to a Diploma of Pharmacy (BPharm) from ISBM University without studying Science in Class 12th. To qualify, candidates must pass higher secondary education (10+2) with Physics, Chemistry, and either Biology or Mathematics. Further, candidates might have to at least score 50% in their 12 exam. ISBM University DPharma is a foundational course in the field of Pharmacy. Diploma in Pharmacy is the full form for DPharm, which is a diploma-level course that lasts for two years. The DPharma curriculum provides students with knowledge in pharmaceutical sciences and pharmacy practice. The curriculum is imparted through lectures, practical sessions, and workshops on the various aspects of pharmacy.
faqs.question: Can I get admission to DPharma at ISBM University without studying Science in class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    No, a Commerce students cannot pursue DPharma after Class 12th at ISBM University. To pursue a Pharmacy porogramme, candidates must have a Science background. In India, most D Pharma programs require candidates to have a Science background with specific subjects at the Class 12 level, including Physics, Chemistry, and either Biology or Mathematics. As a Commerce student, candidates may not meet the typical eligibility criteria for D Pharma admission since they would not have studied the necessary Science subjects.
faqs.question: Can a Commerce student do DPharma after Class 12th at ISBM University?

overview_faqs.question: Why choose ISBM University?
overview_faqs.answer: ISBM University is a well-known university for its wide range of courses, extracurricular activities and placement record. Candidates can take a look below at the various aspects of choosing ISBM University:ISBM University organises a variety of events and has departmental clubs. Some of the popular events include Indradhanushya (annual function), NCC event and Khadi and Village Industries Commission (KVIC) event. Apart from this, ISBM has collaborated with various international institutions such as Rushford Business School, Henry Harvin, and Indiana Tech University. The University has proven a decent placement record with top recruiters including HDFC, Capgemini, Amazon and Aditya Birla. It also has a panel of experienced faculty members who regularly organise workshops, educational tours, industrial visits, seminars, and symposiums on a regular basis.Spread across 32 acres of land, the campus of ISBM is modern with amenities including transportation facilities, a hostel for both boys

overview_faqs.question: Is doing B.Pharm from ISBM University a good option?
overview_faqs.answer: Whether pursuing a BPharmacy is a good career option in India depends on one’s interests, career goals, and the opportunities available in the field. However, here are some factors to consider whilst evaluating a B Pharmacy careerSteady Demand: The Pharmaceutical industry in India is robust and continues to grow. There is a consistent demand for pharmacists in various sectors, including pharmaceutical manufacturing, research and development, hospitals, retail pharmacy, and regulatory affairs.Diverse Career Opportunities: B Pharmacy graduates have a wide range of career options to choose from, including roles in drug formulation, quality control, regulatory compliance, clinical research, and more. Industry Growth: The Indian Pharmaceutical industry is one of the largest in the world and is expected to continue growing. Research Opportunities: If one has an interest in research, they can pursue higher education (M Pharmacy or PhD) and engage in pharmaceutical research and development.

admission_overview.title: ISBM University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: ISBM University admissions 2026 are primarily merit-based. ISBM University has 15 schools under its umbrella that offer Master of Arts (MA), MBA, BA, MSc, BTech, and Research programmes in a wide range of streams, including Management, Law, Science, Commerce, Arts & Humanities, Pharmacy, etc. ISBM University courses are offered in full-time mode. Candidates can fill in an online application form or download it and submit it at the respective address via offline mode. The university charges an application fee of INR 900.

paragraphs: ISBM University admissions are majorly merit-based. Register online for admission to the preferred course. The courses are offered in a full-time mode. Candidates are required to fill out the application form on the official website to The admission process at ISBM University is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: ISBM University Application Process 2026

The mode of application is both online and offline. Aspirants need to apply for various courses at the UG and PG levels. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website. Candidates are required to fill out the "Connect with our Counselor" form on the "Apply Now" section on the Homepage. Candidates are required to pay anapplication fee of INR 900as well.
STEP 2: Selection
Candidates are selected based on their academics in Class 12 or UG. Shortlisted candidates are invited for the next rounds of admission.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of the ISBM University cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theISBM University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.answer: To be  eligible for aBCom course admissiokn at ISBM University, candidates must have twelve years of school education in the Commerce stream with some compulsory subjects includingAccountancy, Business Studies, or Economics, andMathematicsas an optional subject. college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at MIT Shillong include BDes, BA and MBA. Apart from these courses, the University also offers courses across streams, including Arts, Commerce, Science, Management, Design, Education, and more. Admission to these courses is based on merit and entrance.
Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12 for admission to UG level programme. In addition to that, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as D-Art, NID DAT, UCEED, MITID and others. Similarly, for PG level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation along with securing valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ CMAT etc.
MIT Shillong placement record reflected a median package of INR 4.5 LPA recieved by the MBA graduates, whereas, for rest of the courses, the median package was INR 3.6 LPA.
Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at MIT Shillong in the table provided below:

BEd, BSc, BDes, BBA, BCom, BSW and more, the median package is INR 3.6 LPA. The University offers various opportunities such as International Exchange Program, International lmmersion Program, International Internship Program and Summer/Winter Internship Program. faqs.answer: The he university offers various courses such as BA, BDes, MA, MBA etc at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university offers doctorate courses. MIT University Shillong course admission is both merit and entrance-based. The university admits students based on various national-level entrance exam scores such as D-ART, SAT India, CAT/MAT etc. Candidates can apply by filling out the university application form either via online or offline mode. Admissions to various programmes offered at the university are both entrance and merit-based. Students willing to apply for the courses offered at the university can visit the official website of the university and apply for the desired programme by following the steps mentioned below:Step 1: Visit MIT Shillong's official website and click on "Apply Now" pop-up shown on the screen and register yourselfStep 2: Fill out the application form, pay the application and submit the form.Step 3: The admission committee of the university will shortlist the candidates based on several parameters.Step 4: Shortlisted candidates will have to pay the course fee and go through document verification (if specified) for admission confirmation.

faqs.answer: For MIT University Shillong BBA admission, an aspirant need to pass Class 12 with a minimum of 50% (45% for reserved category students) aggregate from a recognised board. Eligible students can fill out the application form via online or offline mode. Admission to this course is merit-based. Candidates with a valid score of the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam can also apply. For further details, candidates can visit the official website of the university.

paragraphs: MIT University Shillongadmission 2025are currently open for admission to multiple  courses, like BA, BDes, MA, MBA etc. at the UG and PG, and doctorate levels. Admission to courses can be either be based on merit or entrance exam performance, depending on the chosen course. To secure admission at MITS, students have to fulfill the eligibility rules set by the university. The application process atMIT University Shillongis conducted online. Read more to know more aboutMIT University Shillongcourse admission2025.

MIT University Shillong admission is openfor various programmes. The university provides over 12 courses across multiple specialisations at UG, PG, and certificate levels. The university offers more than 15 courses including specialisations in various streams such as Arts, Design, Management, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Students seeking to apply to the offered programmes can refer to the following table to learn aboutMIT University Shillong admission 2025highlights:
MIT University Shillong Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
15+ courses including specialisations across various specialisations
Admission Status 2025
How to apply
https://mituniversityindia.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG & PhD
Download Now
MIT University Shillong Brochure

MIT University Shillong course admissionis both merit and entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. If deemed necessary, MIT University Shillong may conduct further rounds of interviews or exams. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularMIT University Shillong courses:
D-ART,SAT India/Portfolio Review and Interview/MIT-DAT,Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam

MIT University Shillong admission processincludes several steps. Students applying for the programmes offered at the university must ensure to satisfy the course-specific admission criteria as per the university's guidelines. The entire application process is in online mode. Below is the step-wiseadmission process of MIT University Shillong:
1. MIT University Shillong Application Process 2025

Interested candidates who fulfil the specified eligibility can visit the official website (https://applicationmitu.extraaedge.com/) of the university to fill out the application form. Candidates need to select the desired course, pay the application fee and upload the required documents to complete the registration.
2. MIT University Shillong Selection Process

Once the registration is done, the candidates are shortlisted based on the marks obtained in the entrance/qualifying exams for the respective courses they chose. The university takes into account both academic merit and entrance exam scores to make a merit list of the eligible candidates for each course. Students are shortlisted by the university based on various parameters, including entrance exams, academic merit, and personal interview (if required). For PhD course admission, students are selected based on the University entrance exam / NET qualification + PI.
3. Counselling and Fee Payment

Once the candidates are shortlisted, the university may contact the candidate for counselling. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theMIT University Shillong feeto confirm their seats at the university.

highlights.summary: Dreamzone School of Creative Studies is an institute in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. At the UG, PG and Certificate levels, the institute offers 41 courses across 7 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Dreamzone School of Creative Studies programs include PG Diploma, UG Diploma and Certificate. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Central Footwear Training Institute provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Design, and have a fee structure of around INR 3,500 to 5,70,000. UG programs include UG Diploma. Further, the PG programs include PG Diploma.

faqs.answer: A:    Central Footwear Training Institute provides programmes including PG Diploma, Certificate, UG Diploma in streams such as Design, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Leather Design, Knitwear Design, Apparel Design, Lifestyle Accesory Design.
faqs.question: Which courses does Central Footwear Training Institute offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Footwear Manufacture and Design - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Very good college and courses are helpful.

review_content.Placements: The placement was good for us and for our seniors too. About 70 % students got placed. The highest salary that was offered is 27000. Companies like relax Noida, Liner, Dawar industries, Tej shoe factory showed interest and there are other companies too.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and built keeping in mind that it is for a shoe institute. Like there are 4 departments in shoe industry and all of them are very effectively aligned in the college. Library is good. The CAD lab is very goid and has all the latest technologies. There is also CCTV for surveillance. Nice parking and sports ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Footwear Manufacture and Design - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college. I suggest you take 1 year certificate course for our future.

review_content.Placements: Around 500 students study in our college. I suggest you take 1 year certificate course because it helps to do good in the future and save time also. They also provide internships at our college, and the recruiting company is Dabur, etc., in Agra.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good, and the course is also good. The college also provides an AC facility. The hostels are good, the food is also good, and the warden is also good.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are qualified and have good behavior. In the course, they conduct exams semester-wise. One more thing is that 80% attendance is compulsory. I suggest you take the certificate course because it will save time and money. Almost all students pass the exams. The teachers are also good and educated. They also suggest that you do the designing.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the course is very good.

review_content.Placements: Graphic designer paid good because of their skills and innovative ideas. There were 5 semesters for teaching, and last 6 semester was for an internship. Haldiram and Bikaji were the companies where they came to meet individual students for their skills. The average salary was 6 LPA. Recruiting company was Sofunky.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was really good. Everything was well organized. The classrooms were clean. Tables were clean and chairs were really comfortable. Classrooms were air-conditioned. Big exhibitions were held, and the security system was good. I am also in the second year 4 semester. Water supplies and canteen were available. Parking area was also there mainly, and I made so many friends there.

college_info.intro:
Sai Nath University offers UG and PG courses across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Education, Law, Pharmacy, and others. BTech and MBA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
Sai Nath University Jharkhand offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Mining Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Electrical Engineering. The MBA programme offered by the Sai Nath University Ranchi is a two-year programme.

admission_process.title: Sai Nath University Ranchi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sai Nath University Ranchi admission process 2026ismerit-basedfor the majority of the programmes. The university accepts bothonline&offlinemodes of the application process. Sai Nath University (SNU) has courses in streams includingEngg., Pharmacy,Nursing, Management,Education, & Law. SNU admission toBPEd & DPEdprogrammes isentrance-based. However, the university also has a provision of direct admission under several programmes, if students meet the specified eligibility criteria set by SNU. Additionally,SNU Ranchialso providesPolytechnic Diplomaprogrammes in Mining, Mechanical, Electrical & Civil Engg..

Located in Ranchi, Jharkhand, Sai Nath University provides quality education to its students. All students should follow the common admission process on a merit basis or entrance test basis which is conducted by SNU (university-level). Check out the Sai Nathi University admission highlights details below:
Particulars

Selection to the majority of UG, PG & diploma courses is done based on merit in the last qualifying examination. Seat reservation to SC/ ST/ OBC/ PwD category students is applicable as per the rule of the Central or Ranchi State Government. The eligibility criteria & selection criteria details ofsome of the popular coursesoffered by Sai Nath University - SNU are tabulated below:

Sai Nath University's admission process includes various stages, such as selection, round,payment ofSNU fees& reporting at the university.Any feepaid at the time of admission or afterwards isnon-refundable. Find below the step-by-step procedure for Sai Nath University Ranchi admission 2025:

Step 1: SNU Ranchi Application 2025:The SNU application form can be submitted online on the official website or downloaded to submit offline. The application fee is to be paidINR 500by DD in the name of 'Sai Nath University, Ranchi'. The registration processing fee with a complete filled-up form is to be submitted on or before the deadline along with the required documents.

Step 2:Selection round:Admission will be accepted based on merit in performance in the qualifying examination for the majority of the programmes. Admission toBPEdis done on the basis ofwritten tests,sports proficiency,physical fitness, & merit in the graduation degree.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation: Selected students need to pay the required admission fee & complete all the formalities of final admission at SNU Ranchi.

During the 2022-23 ongoing placements of SNU Noida, the highest package offered to students was Rs. 58.09 LPA while the average package was Rs. 12.46 LPA. In 2021, 88% of fellowship graduates got placement opportunities during Sai University's placement drive. The highest salary package reached INR 15 LPA with an average salary range of INR 6 LPA .

faqs.question: What is the average package for B.Tech Electrical Engineering students at Sai Nath University?
faqs.answer: In 2023, Sai Nath University's average package for B.Tech Electrical Engineering students was INR 6.05 LPA, while the best package achieved INR 52 LPA. However if you want a good package you should work smart throughout the course and during interviews you have to perform great to get a higher package and a great job. In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after pursuing BCom from Sai Nath University?
faqs.answer: The Bachelor of Commerce (BCom) is an important programme in the field of commerce. This undergraduate course provides various career options such as private or government jobs in different industries, opportunities for entrepreneurship, and further education like MCom , or MBA. Graduates from Sai Nath University's BCom programme can also explore job opportunities through campus placements. On average, BCom (Hons) graduates can expect a starting salary package of INR 3.5 LPA. Some job positions that BCom graduates can pursue are listed below: Accountant Business Executive Accounts Manager Tax Consultant Financial Consultant Account Executive Business Consultant.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at SNU - Sai Nath University?
faqs.answer: SNU - Sai Nath University the highest salary package offered is 12 LPA , and the the lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA . The average salary package offered is 4.5 LPA. Top companies like Amazon, Flipkart, TCS, Myntra, Accenture, Mahindra, TVs, Reliance, etc., visit our campus to hire students.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sai Nath University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: This college has the best faculty members who are friendly with students and help with all problems.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available, such as Wi-Fi, lab, library, polyhouse, mushroom cultivation room, etc. There are sports and game facilities. All festivals and parties are celebrated every 2-3 months. There is a 24/7 light available, and the warden is very helpful. The mess food is average in taste.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has various facilities like labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of food is average. Rooms are average. Washing machines are available, but we have to pay to use them. The canteen operates only at certain times. A playground and indoor games are provided by the warden. The crowd is not that much. Exams are conducted at a home center. The HOD is supportive, and placements are provided. It is a nice college with a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best when compared to the other universities in Jharkhand.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available for diploma students of pharmacy are all like smart class, labs and there is a library also which is full of books. All books are there which are required to study. The quality of the food available in the mess is not so nice.

reviews.review_heading: Sai Nath University is a very good college, and everyone should take admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Sai Nath University hostels is very good. The buildings are too big, and the rooms are very good, neat, and clean. All the necessary things are already present in the room. The mess at Sai Nath University is very good, and the food is very tasty. Different days offer different foods, with both veg and non-veg options available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SNU - Sai Nath University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good and very big. College protects the trees and installs new plants for the college ecosystem. College hostel is neat and clean. The food provided in the mess is tasty and healthy. College provides water coolers for the students.

reviews.review_heading: A standard college for students.
reviews.review_text: The teachers are knowledgeable, which helps students achieve good marks in exams. Mining Engineering is a rewarding course for those interested in the coal industry. We have sessional exams twice every semester, which aid in preparation for the main exams.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculties and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are big and spacious and CCTV cameras are equipped. Labs and libraries are also well equipped with lots of books and other necessary materials. WiFi is available on our campus. Hostel is good according to fees. Security is good. Hostel mess food quality is also good with lots of variety.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, excellent facilities and satisfactory experience.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are spacious and have CCTV cameras for security. Wifi is available throughout the college. The library is well furnished and has a lot of books. The hostel is affordable, and the facilities are good for the fees that I pay. There is a washing machine and geyser on every floor. The mess food has a variety of food every day, and the quality is above average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SNU - Sai Nath University.
reviews.review_text: In our college, laboratories are good. We have a field for fieldwork. We have huge classrooms with digital boards. The library is available, and we can borrow books for ourselves.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely the best university in Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: At Sai Nath University, there is a very big campus. So for the B.Sc., B.Ed course,  all related facilities are available like labs, classrooms available for all separate classes, and a library. The college hostel is quite the best for students. The food is of good quality. Medical facilities, sports, and games are the best in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of its location and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, the library is available, classrooms are big, and laboratories are also available. The hostel is normal. The quality of food served in mess is average. The medical facility is not available. There are sports like cricket, volleyball, and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: This college is value for money. Students won't regret coming to this college.
reviews.review_text: This university has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities, and basic amenities. Our classroom has a high quality furnished benches and tables, projectors for better understanding, CCTV cameras, there are around 10 different laboratories, more than 2 libraries, various sports ground and courts are there and many such countless facilities are waiting for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of the infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here, and the campus is nice with an open area. Classrooms are huge and good. There are computer labs and engineering labs. The library is good, and there is a hostel with a mess facility. The only bad thing is the college is situated very far from the city area. So medical facilities are not available.

In college the study is good but the crowd is not good that much & also location is just average. Teacher knowledge is at par. Course fees is cheap as compare to other colleges. 
Infrastructure of college is not up to the mark. College also have library building. In college the study is good but the crowd is not good that much & also location is just average. Teacher knowledge is at par. Course fees is cheap as compare to other colleges. 
Infrastructure of college is not up to the mark. College also have library building.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sai Nath University, Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was good, but the messy food was not good. However, let me tell you, you were really able to enjoy hostel life very well. There were big facilities to play cricket in the hostel. If you were a cricket player, you could play at the back. The hostels were big enough, but you might not have liked the food during the match.

The university is recognised by AICTE and UGC.The Department of Studies in Business Administration, or IMS, was founded in 1992 with 28 students and has since expanded to become a full-fledged institute with 120 students enrolled. admission_overview.college_name: Davangere University Admission 2025: Dates, Application, Eligibility, Fees

paragraphs: Davangere University admissionto courses is merit or entrance-based. Students can also pursue diploma/ certificate courses.Davangere Universityoffers UG, PG and PhD programmes across five departments. Candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it in offline mode.

Davangere University offers admission based on entrance exam scores. The university accepts entrance test scores in MBA. Below are some of theDavangere University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Candidates must have passed Class 12 from any recognised board
Merit-based
Passed Class 12 from any recognised board
Merit-based
Passed BSc in Science subjects from a recognised university with a minimum 45% aggregate
Davangere University Entrance Test
Passed BA from a recognised university with a minimum 45% aggregate
Davangere University Entrance Test
Passed graduation from a recognised university with a minimum 50% aggregate
Karnataka PGCET
Download:Davangere University Prospectus
The university accepts applications online. Candidates need to participate in the selection rounds to get a seat in the university. Below are the steps to get admission in Davangere University:
Step 1: Davangere University Application Process 2025
Candidates have to fill out the application form and pay an application fee to register for a course. Aspirants have to upload the specified documents in the application form.
Step 2: Selection

The university conducts an entrance test for admission to PG courses. Davangere University considers Karnataka PGCET for admission to MBA programme. The selection for UG courses is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Merit List & Counselling

The university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Further, aspirants have to participate in counselling and document verification. Selected candidates have to pay theDavangere University feeto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I get Davangere University, MBA with a 56 percentile in Karnataka PGCET?
faqs.answer: Candidates who are appearing for PGCET Karnataka should have 3 years of Bachelor degree or any other degree which is recognised by board or an university.Candidates should score atleast 50% marks. 45% marks in QE in case of SC/ST category of Karnataka candidates this for full time student.Candidates who willing to apply for part time should have 3 years of Bachelor degree.Marks system is same as full time 50% marks and 45% marks in case of SC /ST category of Karnataka candidates.In addition to this after obtaining the degree must have worked for no less than three years in ana establishment and must have  working in an organisation suited within a radial distance of 40km from the institution.

Davangere University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 31234 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 27465 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Davangere University. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 31234 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 24356.

course_faqs.question: Is the MBA degree from Monad University valid?
course_faqs.answer: Monad University being established in the year 2010, holds the right to host a course programme such as MBA and after successful completion of course, the University is authorized to issue the completion degree of respective courses in the names of concerned students. Therefore, yes the MBA degree from Monad University is valid.

course_faqs.question: Can I get scholarship for MBA course at Monad University?
course_faqs.answer: Monad University has organised the scholarship programme for all the students studying in this university. This university aims to promote education for students despite of financial constraints by providing fee relxation. The meritorious students are entitled for this scholarship. Students from the reserved categories can also avail the scholarship. The students should be eligible for scholarship according to the university rules.

course_faqs.question: Is MBA at Monad University worth investing for?
course_faqs.answer: The Monad University is approved by various bodies including UGC. It was established in the year 2010. The placement record of the college is decent. The alumni base of the institute includes more than 4,500 students according to their official website. The choice of institution is subject to personal ambition and requirements. The experience may vary from person to person hence, it is always better to make informed decision.

paragraphs: Monad University admission to its various courses is done on the basis of the academic scores of students. The university offers UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral programmes. There are 77 academic courses that are offered through eight departments. Monad University also offers Polytechnic diploma, Certificate, and Advanced Certificate courses in collaboration with Construction Development Industry Council (CIDC).
Monad University offers over 77 courses through eight schools. Candidates can check below the key highlights forMonad University admissions:

The university offers admission to courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must fulfil the course-specific eligibility to apply for their preferred course. Below are popularMonad University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Monad University admissions begins with the registration process. Candidates need to select their preferred course and fill out the application form for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in Monad University:
STEP 1: Monad University Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply on the official website of the university. Aspirants will first need to register and then fill out the application form for their preferred course.
STEP 2: Selection
Applicants are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for admissions. The institute evaluates the application form of the candidates to confirm their eligibility.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once selected, aspirants need to pay theMonad University feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

faqs.question: What are the government job profiles available for BSc graduates?
faqs.answer: Because of their prestige, job security, competitive pay, and enticing benefits, public sector jobs are still in high demand in India. With a bachelor's degree in science, a candidate can apply for a wide range of public sector positions that complement their technical expertise and analytical abilities. A bachelor's degree in any scientific field opens doors to research jobs at national labs and institutes. For BSc graduates, the following are some common government job profiles : Government Job Profiles for BSc Graduates Research Scientist Clinical Research Specialist Lab Technician Biochemist Assistant Nurse Forest Department- IFS Officer FCI- Trainee RBI Grade B Officer LIC- AAO SBI PO Note: The information is sourced from external sites and may vary.

highlights.summary:
As per the latest QS World University Rankings 2026, Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences (SIMATS) has been ranked between 901-950.

The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Saveetha University Chennai include MBBS and BTech. For the MBBS program, candidates must qualify NEET-UG exam. The seat intake for the course is 250. On the other hand, for the BTech programme, students must have passed Class 12 with 45% aggregate marks from a recognised board. The seat intake for the BTech course is 2160. individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and curriculum.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students are placed last year. The top I know is 48 LPA and last year the highest package offered is 36LPA. They offer many internships and allow us to gain knowledge. They are using flexi learn which allows you to study which course you want to study and which staff member you want to teach you.
content.Infrastructure: There are many lab facilities. All subject labs are available and we are allowed do everything practically. They even allow you to get everything more practically and at the same time you can study theoretically too soo that you can score academically.

individual_reviews.title: Good, but it is very important to improve further.
