admission_overview.college_name: Saveetha University Admission 2025: Cutoffs, Eligibility, Application, Fee & Dates

admission_process.title: Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Saveetha University (SU),Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciencesoffers UG, PG and doctorate level in the field of Engineering, Architecture, Law, Nursing, Medical and Management. Admission to these programmes is either based on entrance exam scores or merit.

Saveetha University, Chennai offers 10 UG and PG programmes in 11 academic departments covering diverse fields of education such as Engineering, Architecture,Management, Law, Medical, Nursing, Dental, Optometry, Physiotherapy, Allied Health Sciences and Pharmacy. A student-to-faculty ratio of 6:1 is maintained by the University, helping students to cultivate closer relationships with lecturers and having quicker access to feedback. SIMATS admission is purely provisional and is always subject to confirmation from Anna University / Directorate of Technical Education, Chennai. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toSaveertha University Courses:

Saveetha University admission process includes registration, selection and fee payment. Below are the steps to get a seat at Saveetha University:STEP 1:Saveetha UniversityApplication Process 2025Candidates must download the application form from the official website of Saveetha University. Besides, candidates can also apply online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1000 to apply for a course. Candidates will also need to submit the specified documents during the application process.STEP 2: SelectionSaveetha University shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance exams such as TNEA, GATE, CLAT, SLAT and SUCET. The college evaluates the application form of the candidates for their eligibility.STEP 3:Admission ConfirmationOnce selected, candidates need to pay acourse feeto confirm their seat in the college.

The institute is ranked #351–400 in the Overall category by the Times Higher Education 2026. Internationally, Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences is ranked #901-950 by the QS World 2026. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: There are many lab facilities. All subject labs are available and we are allowed do everything practically. They even allow you to get everything more practically and at the same time you can study theoretically too soo that you can score academically.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 5 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good, but it is very important to improve further.
reviews.review_text: Good, we have all the facilities which help us to be comfortable and gain some knowledge in my studies. Hostel facilities are not that good, but we can manage and adjust to be in a comfort zone, and food is provided by canteens, not by the college, which costs differently for different canteens.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 3 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: SIMATS, Saveetha University review.
reviews.review_text: One of the best infrastructures in Chennai. Best labs also, and the buildings are just amazing, more than enough computer labs and placement training cells. There is no compromise in infrastructure, but the drawback is it's far from the city, that's all I can say.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 24 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best part in my life is Saveetha because they made me a proper man.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is good because I stayed there for 2 years. The hostel is well-clean and neat. The classrooms have AC, and the whole campus has Wi-Fi facility. The food available at the time canteen is good because we have a hospital on our campus. There are so many sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 12 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A step to grow my career in life is based on the quality of education, faculty, and environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is very good. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The library is big and good. The canteen food is good and tasty. There is a medical facility on campus as well. The college gives more importance to games and sports. Overall, hostels are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Some are satisfied, but compared to other colleges, the infrastructure and facilities here are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good. Wi-Fi and a library are also available. The hostel is good, but the food will be charged according to what I can eat. There is no mess, all is in the canteens only. The medical facilities are very good, and Saveetha Hospital is nearby.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 30 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is very good and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at the college are very good. The college management provided 24/7 Wi-Fi, AC in classrooms and hostel rooms, separate labs for each course, the infrastructure of the classrooms is very good, and the infrastructure and books of the library are good. There are lot of canteens for food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 29 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am very happy because I joined a good college.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is good because the college is following the flipped learn methods, which is more useful for us. The classrooms are good, the campus has full Wi-Fi facilities available, the canteen is good, there are too many canteens in our college, and the college gives importance to sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good college where we can study freely in our own choice of subjects and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college is mainly known for its infrastructure. We have different buildings, e.g., circular building, rectangular block, SCAD, AHS, medical, and autonomous building, etc. We have a prototype lab, an electrical lab, an agricultural place, a medical lab, etc. We have everything in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 10 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Saveetha School of Engineering In the ME course admission.
reviews.review_text: Table campus Wi-Fi, a library full of research papers, and well-equipped labs with the newest technologies. Although clean, the hostel rooms could be noisy at times. Mess food is mediocre; canteen snacks are superior. Cricket, badminton, and a small gym were among the sports offered.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 26 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, decent faculty, industry-relevant courses, and strong placement support.
reviews.review_text: Department facilities & infrastructure: The AI department has good infrastructure. Classrooms are smart classrooms with projectors. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Labs are well-equipped for AI, ML, Python, and hardware-related subjects. The central library has both physical and digital resources with access to research journals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 17 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha University.
reviews.review_text: The CSE department at Saveetha offers excellent infrastructure. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and classrooms are equipped with modern smart boards. We get extensive hands-on experience in multiple advanced labs with high-performance computers. The central library provides vast digital resources. For campus life, the hostel facilities are diverse. The unique food court system offers a great variety, and a major advantage is the on-campus hospital for 24x7 medical care. It has a massive spor...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 14 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has a modern campus, great infrastructure, smart classrooms, and well-equipped labs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my department at Saveetha School of Engineering is modern and well maintained. Every classroom is equipped with projectors and digital boards providing a smart learning environment. High-speed WiFi is accessible across the academic blocks and hostels. The department labs are fully equipped with updated systems tools and industrygrade software especially in branches like CSE ECE and Mechanical. The central library is spacious and air conditioned. It provides access to a wid...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 9 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement is there.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities at the college are so good, but Saveetha College is better for furniture and other things which is for students. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are so good for us. Coming to the hostel, for us, only canteens are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha UniversityReviewed on 28 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college journey at Saveetha School of Engineering, Saveetha University.
reviews.review_text: Instructions of the college are excellent, and the campus is full of greenery. The campus is spread over 180 acres of land. The college also provides quality labs with Wi-Fi. There are six hostels, three for boys and three for girls. There is a hospital on the campus where doctors are available 24x7.

highlights.summary: International School of Design, Pimpri-Chinchwad is a private institute and is located in Pune, Maharashtra. International School of Design, Pimpri-Chinchwad courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Certificate levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. International School of Design, Pimpri-Chinchwad offers a total of 62 courses in streams such as Business & Management Studies, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design and Animation. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., B.Des and M.Des. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Digital Marketing, Fashion Design, Graphic Design, Jewellery Design and Textile Design. Further, the fee for all these courses is INR 2,60,720. Apart from this, the International School of Design, Pimpri-Chinchwad campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

college_info.intro:
Centre for Liberal and Advanced Studies, SAGE University Bhopal offers BTech and MBA as its popular programmes. The college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. CLAS SAGE University Bhopal courses are offered to students in full-time mode and across several specialisations.
These courses are offered in specialisations such as AI with Quantum, Computer Science, Marketing with AI, Finance with AI, Business Analytics, Forestry Management, Digital Marketing, and Entrepreneurship & Family Business. admission_overview.title: Centre for Liberal and Advanced Studies, SAGE University Bhopal Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Centre for Liberal and Advanced Studies, SAGE University Bhopal admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The center under SAGE University, Bhopal considers CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT, etc. scores for admission to MBA course. For all other courses, selection is based on merit. Centre for Liberal and Advanced Studies, SAGE University Bhopal offers courses at UG and PG levels including BTech, BBA, BDes and MBA. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

eligibility_selection.title: Centre for Liberal and Advanced Studies, SAGE University Bhopal Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Centre for Liberal and Advanced Studies, SAGE University Bhopal offers full-time UG and PG courses. Candidates need to fulfil the merit requirements for UG courses whereas, selection for PG programmes is entrance-based. Aspirants also need to meet the eligibility requirements to apply for a course. Below are Centre for Liberal and Advanced Studies, SAGE University Bhopal courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

faqs.answer: A minimum of Class 12 is required to apply for any of the UG courses offered at Centre for Liberal and Advanced Studies, SAGE University Bhopal. The minimum aggregate required in Class 12 is 50%. Hence, aspirants who have secured 60% aggregate in Class 12 are eligible to apply for any of the UG programmes. However, mere meeting the eligibility requirements does not guarantee admission. Aspirants also need to qualify all the selection rounds for admission.

admission_process.title: Centre for Liberal and Advanced Studies, SAGE University Bhopal Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The centre offers admission to courses based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Admissions are currently open for all the offered programmes. Candidates can check below the steps to get a seat in the CLAS:

Aspirants can apply online for the preferred course. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility requirements to fill out the application form. Aspirants also need to pay an application fee via any of the online payment modes.

Centre for Liberal and Advanced Studies, SAGE University Bhopal shortlists candidates for UG courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. For MBA, the selection is based on CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT or any other Management entrance exam scores. Besides, the centre also evaluates the past academic record, statement of purpose and extracurricular ectivities and achievements of the candidate.

Once the selection process is over, the centre informs the shortlisted candidates via email or SMS about their admission status. Selected candidates further need to pay theCLAS feeto confirm their seat.
